title: Scarecrow golem
description: This dataoack adds a new golem to the game that trades crops using pumpkin seeds as currency. However, it becomes hostile at night.
body: Summon a new and enigmatic straw golem by constructing it with 2 wooden fences of any type as arms, a hay block as its body, and a Jack o’Lantern on top as its head. During the day, it acts as a friendly merchant who trades crops in exchange for pumpkin seeds, but when night falls its nature changes and it becomes a hostile enemy willing to attack anyone who approaches.
